zh.lifeSummary: Hugh FitzHugh是Henry FitzHugh和Joan Fourneux的兒子，於大約1338年出生在英國越可爾拉文斯沃斯。他於1350年9月與Joan Scrope在英國越可爾拉文斯沃斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1368年8月29日在英國英格蘭越可爾拉文斯沃斯享年31歲，埋葬在英國越可爾易亞斯特 維頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hugh FitzHugh是Henry FitzHugh和Joan Fourneux的儿子，于大约1338年出生在英国越可爾拉文斯沃斯。他于1350年9月与Joan Scrope在英国越可爾拉文斯沃斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1368年8月29日在英国英格兰越可爾拉文斯沃斯享年31岁，埋葬在英国越可爾易亞斯特 維頓。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Hugh (see Hugh ), ‘son of Hugh’.

History: William Fitzhugh (1651–1701), from Bedford, England, emigrated to VA c. 1670 and established himself on the Potomac River in what was then Stafford County, VA, as a planter and exporter. He also practiced law, was a member of the Virginia House of Burgesses, and served in 1687 as lieutenant colonel of the county militia.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: Hugh FitzHugh was born about 1338, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England as the son of Henry FitzHugh and Joan Fourneux. He married Joan Scrope in September 1350, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 29 August 1368, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31, and was buried in East Witton, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Hugh FitzHugh est né environ 1338, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, fils de Henry FitzHugh et Joan Fourneux. Il a épousé Joan Scrope en septembre 1350, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 29 août 1368, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterré à East Witton, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Hugh FitzHugh wurde um 1338 in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, als Sohn von Henry FitzHugh und Joan Fourneux geboren. Er hat im September 1350 in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England Joan Scrope geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 29. August 1368 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in East Witton, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Hugh FitzHugh è nato il circa 1338 nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England come figlio di Henry FitzHugh e Joan Fourneux. Lui sposato Joan Scrope nel settembre 1350, nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 29 agosto 1368, nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolto a East Witton, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh FitzHughは約1338年にイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスでHenry FitzHughとJoan Fourneuxの息子として生まれた。1350年9月にイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスでJoan Scropeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1368年8月29日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスで31歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアエアスト ウィットオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh FitzHugh(은)는 대략 1338년 영국 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 Henry FitzHugh(와)과 Joan Fourneux의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1350년 9월 영국 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 Joan Scrope(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1368년 8월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 이스트 윗튼에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hugh FitzHugh nasceu aproximadamente 1338, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra filho de Henry FitzHugh e Joan Fourneux. Ele casou-se com Joan Scrope em setembro de 1350, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de agosto de 1368, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 31 anos, e foi sepultado em East Witton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Hugh FitzHugh родился около 1338 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия. Его родителей звали Henry FitzHugh и Joan Fourneux. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Scrope сентябрь 1350 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 29 августа 1368 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год и был похоронен в местности эаст виттон, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Hugh FitzHugh nació aproximadamente 1338, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Henry FitzHugh y Joan Fourneux. Se casó con Joan Scrope en septiembre de 1350, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 29 de agosto de 1368, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultado en East Witton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
